things.name: Nike Art Gallery
things.description: Africa's largest private art gallery with 7 floors of contemporary Nigerian art

things.name: Lekki Conservation Centre
things.description: Africa's longest canopy walkway through the Lagos urban mangrove forest

things.name: Freedom Park
things.description: Former colonial prison transformed into a concert and cultural events venue

things.name: National Museum Lagos
things.description: Benin bronzes, traditional costumes and Nok terracotta sculptures

things.name: Elegushi Beach (Lekki Beach)
things.description: Most popular beach in Lagos with beach bars, music and Atlantic Ocean waves

things.name: Terra Kulture Arts Centre
things.description: Visual and performing arts centre celebrating Nigerian culture

things.name: Balogun Market
things.description: Lagos Island's chaotic, colour-filled fabric and fashion market

things.name: Ikoyi & Banana Island
things.description: Lagos's most exclusive neighbourhood with restaurants, bars and a yacht club

things.name: Afrobeats Concert Scene
things.description: Lagos is Africa's music capital - Burna Boy, Wizkid and Davido are from here

things.name: Suya at Night Market
things.description: Spicy grilled skewered meat seasoned with yaji - Nigeria's greatest street food
